title: Kitchen Perfected 2000W 1.7L Electric Cordless Kettle - Dual Water Level Windows with Cup Indicators - Washable Filter - On/Off Indicator Light -Automatic Safety Shut-Off - E1524GR - Anthracite Grey
features: 2000W 1.7L CORDLESS KETTLE: With a 1.7 litre (approx. 3 pints) capacity jug, this 2000W cordless kettle is big enough to fill seven cups, which makes it the ideal choice for a family home. The minimum volume is just 2 cups, so it's perfect for that much needed morning coffee as well as for when the whole family visit. Combine this Kitchen Perfected kettle with a matching toaster or kitchen appliance from the collection for colour coordinating style.

STYLISH DESIGN: The simple, sleek design makes this kettle a stylish accessory for any kitchen worktop and with a cord tidy built-in to the base, there's no untidy wires. The kettle is made from quality, durable plastic with a heat resistant handle and the hinged lid opens wide making it easy to refill and accessible to clean. The power cord attaches to a separate power base so you're not restricted by the length of the cord when filling and pouring the kettle.

REMOVABLE, WASHABLE FILTER: The filter prevents limescale and bits from getting in to the cup when pouring. It sits inside the easy pour spout and simply slides out, ready to be rinsed under warm water and slid back in to place.

DUAL WATER LEVEL WINDOWS WITH CUP GAUGE: Check water levels without lifting the lid with the water level windows on each side of the kettle - ideal if you're right or left handed. Clearly marked on the windows are cup gauges, these show you the ideal water level needed to fill 2, 3, 5 and 7 cups. To save energy and speed up boiling, make sure to use the cup gauges to measure exactly the number of cups required before boiling.

AUTOMATIC SAFETY SHUT-OFF AND LED ON / OFF LIGHT: The red on / off power switch has an indicator light which illuminates when the kettle is boiling, so at a glance you can see if the kettle has finished heating. Once at temperature, the kettle will automatically turn off and with boil-dry protection the kettle will shut-off if it does not contain enough water.
description: Cordless Design With the sleek anthracite grey design, this Kitchen Perfected cordless kettle is a great addition to any kitchen worktop. The base conceals a built-in cord tidy so there's no need for excess wires across your worktop and the cordless design means you can lift the kettle from the base so you?re not restricted by the length of the cord when filling and pouring. The removable filter sits inside the easy pour spout and prevents limescale and bits from getting in to the cup when pouring. The hinged lid opens wide making it easy to refill the kettle and accessible to clean. Team up with a Kitchen Perfected toaster for colour coordinating style. The kettle measures 22 x 13 x 22cm. Perfect Family Size The kettle holds up to 1.7 litres, which makes up to approximately 7 cups of tea or coffee. Use the indicator windows on each side of the model to gauge the perfect water level for 2, 3, 5 and 7 cups. By boiling only the water you need, you save energy and speed up boiling. From 2 - 7 cups, it's the ideal size for a round of brews for the whole family or that quick morning coffee. Safety Shut-off An indicator light in the on / off switch illuminates when the kettle is boiling and once at temperature the kettle will automatically shut-off. Boil-dry protection means the kettle will shut-off if it does not contain enough water. Box Includes: 1 x Kitchen Perfected 2000W 1.7L Cordless Kettle in anthracite grey 1 x Product manual
